            ) - lists:sum([C * C || {_, C} <- ValidYs]),
            Sum div 2
    end.

solve(Points) ->
    Mod = 1000000007,
    % Group points by y-coordinate
    YGroups = lists:foldl(fun([X, Y], Acc) ->
        case lists:keyfind(Y, 1, Acc) of
            false -> [{Y, [X]} | Acc];
            {Y, Xs} -> lists:keyreplace(Y, 1, Acc, {Y, [X | Xs]})
        end
    end, [], Points),
    % Filter groups with at least 2 points (to form parallel sides)
    FilteredGroups = lists:filter(fun({_, Xs}) -> length(Xs) >= 2 end, YGroups),
    % Calculate combinations for each group and sum up
    GroupCombinations = lists:foldl(fun({_, Xs}, Sum) ->
        K = length(Xs),
        if 
            K >= 2 -> (Sum + (K * (K - 1) div 2)) rem Mod;
            true -> Sum
        end
    end, 0, FilteredGroups),
    % Now calculate combinations between different groups
    % We need to find pairs of groups (y1, y2) where y1 /= y2
    % For each such pair, the number of trapezoids is C(len1, 2) * C(len2, 2)
    % Sum all such pairs
    case length(FilteredGroups) of
        L when L < 2 -> GroupCombinations;
        _ ->
            % Extract counts (C(len, 2) for each group)
            Counts = lists:map(fun({_, Xs}) ->
                K = length(Xs),
                K * (K - 1) div 2
            end, FilteredGroups),
            % Sum of all counts
            TotalCounts = lists:sum(Counts),
            % Sum of squares of counts
            SumSquares = lists:foldl(fun(C, Acc) -> (Acc + C * C) rem Mod end, 0, Counts),
            % Total pairs is (TotalCounts^2 - SumSquares) / 2
            TotalPairs = (TotalCounts * TotalCounts - SumSquares) div 2,
            (GroupCombinations + TotalPairs) rem Mod
    end.

solve(Points) ->
    % Group points by their y-coordinate to find horizontal lines
    YGroups = lists:foldl(
        fun([X, Y], Acc) ->
            case maps:find(Y, Acc) of
                {ok, List} -> maps:put(Y, [X | List], Acc);
                error -> maps:put(Y, [X], Acc)
            end
        end,
        maps:new(),
        Points
    ),
    % Filter out y-coordinates with at least 2 points (potential horizontal lines)
    PotentialLines = maps:filter(fun(_, V) -> length(V) >= 2 end, YGroups),
    % Get all y-coordinates with at least 2 points
    Ys = maps:keys(PotentialLines),
    % Generate all possible pairs of y-coordinates (for potential trapezoids)
    YPairs = [{Y1, Y2} || Y1 <- Ys, Y2 <- Ys, Y1 < Y2],
    % For each pair of y-coordinates, count the number of common x-coordinates
    % and compute the combinations
    lists:foldl(
        fun({Y1, Y2}, Acc) ->
            Xs1 = lists:sort(maps:get(Y1, PotentialLines)),
            Xs2 = lists:sort(maps:get(Y2, PotentialLines)),
            Common = common_elements(Xs1, Xs2),
            C = length(Common),
            if
                C >= 2 ->
                    % Number of ways to choose 2 common x-coordinates
                    CombCommon = C * (C - 1) div 2,
                    % Number of ways to choose 2 distinct x-coordinates from Y1 and Y2
                    Total1 = length(Xs1),
                    Total2 = length(Xs2),
                    Comb1 = Total1 * (Total1 - 1) div 2,
                    Comb2 = Total2 * (Total2 - 1) div 2,
                    % Subtract combinations where both x-coordinates are common
                    ValidComb = Comb1 * Comb2 - CombCommon * CombCommon,
                    (Acc + ValidComb) rem 1000000007;
                true ->
                    % No common x-coordinates, so all combinations are valid
                    Total1 = length(Xs1),
                    Total2 = length(Xs2),
                    Comb1 = Total1 * (Total1 - 1) div 2,
                    Comb2 = Total2 * (Total2 - 1) div 2,
                    (Acc + Comb1 * Comb2) rem 1000000007
            end
        end,
        0,
        YPairs
    ).

common_elements(List1, List2) ->
    common_elements(List1, List2, []).

common_elements([], _, Acc) -> Acc;
common_elements(_, [], Acc) -> Acc;
common_elements([X1 | Rest1], [X2 | Rest2], Acc) when X1 < X2 ->
    common_elements(Rest1, [X2 | Rest2], Acc);
common_elements([X1 | Rest1], [X2 | Rest2], Acc) when X1 > X2 ->
    common_elements([X1 | Rest1], Rest2, Acc);
common_elements([X | Rest1], [X | Rest2], Acc) ->
    common_elements(Rest1, Rest2, [X | Acc]).

solve(Points) ->
    % Group points by their y-coordinate to find horizontal lines
    YGroups = lists:foldl(fun([X, Y], Acc) ->
        case maps:find(Y, Acc) of
            {ok, List} -> maps:put(Y, [X | List], Acc);
            error -> maps:put(Y, [X], Acc)
        end
    end, maps:new(), Points),
    
    % Filter out y-coordinates with at least 2 points (to form horizontal lines)
    ValidYs = maps:filter(fun(_, Xs) -> length(Xs) >= 2 end, YGroups),
    
    % For each y-coordinate, sort the x-coordinates to easily form pairs
    SortedGroups = maps:map(fun(_, Xs) -> lists:sort(fun(A, B) -> A =< B end, Xs) end, ValidYs),
    
    % Collect all y-coordinates with at least 2 points
    YList = maps:keys(SortedGroups),
    
    % Calculate combinations of two y-coordinates (C(YList, 2))
    YPairs = [{Y1, Y2} || Y1 <- YList, Y2 <- YList, Y1 < Y2],

    YGroups = lists:foldl(fun([X, Y], Acc) ->

solve(Points) ->
    % Group points by their y-coordinate
    YGroups = lists:foldl(fun([X, Y], Acc) ->
        case maps:find(Y, Acc) of
            {ok, List} -> maps:put(Y, [X | List], Acc);

    % Count the number of common x-pairs between two sorted lists

    if

        true ->
            C1 = (Len1 * (Len1 - 1)) div 2,
            C2 = (Len2 * (Len2 - 1)) div 2,
            C1 * C2
    end.

    Total.

    lists:foldl(
        fun([X, Y], Dict) ->
            case dict:find(Y, Dict) of
                {ok, List} -> dict:store(Y, [[X, Y] | List], Dict);
                error -> dict:store(Y, [[X, Y]], Dict)
            end
        end, dict:new(), Points).

solve(Points) ->
    % Group points by their y-coordinate to find horizontal lines
    YGroups = lists:foldl(fun([X, Y], Acc) ->
        case maps:find(Y, Acc) of
            {ok, List} -> maps:put(Y, [X | List], Acc);
            error -> maps:put(Y, [X], Acc)
        end
    end, maps:new(), Points),
    
    % Filter out y-coordinates with at least 2 points (potential horizontal lines)
    YGroupsFiltered = maps:filter(fun(_, V) -> length(V) >= 2 end, YGroups),
    
    % Get all pairs of y-coordinates (y1, y2) where y1 < y2
    YList = maps:keys(YGroupsFiltered),
    YPairs = [{Y1, Y2} || Y1 <- YList, Y2 <- YList, Y1 < Y2],
    
    % For each pair (y1, y2), count the number of common x-coordinates between y1 and y2
    Count = lists:foldl(fun({Y1, Y2}, Acc) ->
        Xs1 = lists:sort(maps:get(Y1, YGroupsFiltered)),
        Xs2 = lists:sort(maps:get(Y2, YGroupsFiltered)),
        Common = common_elements(Xs1, Xs2),
        C = length(Common),
